use_cases: Landing pages for creative portfolios and artist showcases requiring immersive 3D visuals
Music and entertainment websites seeking cinematic hero experiences
SaaS landing pages that demand memorable first impressions through animation
Portfolio sites for photographers, designers, and digital artists
Brand experiences requiring atmospheric scroll-driven storytelling
ai_summary: An immersive 3D hero section leveraging Three.js with scroll-triggered camera animations, particle star fields, and atmospheric fog effects. Features smooth GSAP-powered transitions between content sections with bloom post-processing for cinematic visual appeal.
